title: Watch: 20,000 teddy bears highlight plight of missing Ukrainian children
summary_full: Each bear in the installation in Washington, DC, is meant to represent one of the children Ukraine says have been abducted by Russia.
summary_public: Each bear in the installation in Washington, DC, is meant to represent one of the children Ukraine says have been abducted by Russia.
